actions.name: create_order

external_id.description: Caller-supplied reference; when set, makes the order creation idempotent (Tremendous returns the existing order instead of creating a duplicate for the same external_id).

funding_source_id.description: Tremendous ID of the funding source to pay with, or the literal "balance" to use the account's Tremendous balance.

reward.description: A single reward sent to a recipient; either campaign_id or products must be specified.

actions.risk: spends real funding-source balance to issue a gift card / prepaid card / donation reward to a recipient; external mutation with real financial impact, approval required

actions.name: approve_order
actions.risk: approves an order pending admin review, releasing its rewards for delivery; real financial impact, approval required

actions.name: reject_order
actions.risk: rejects an order pending admin review; the order's rewards are never delivered

actions.name: cancel_reward
actions.risk: cancels and refunds a reward; only valid for non-expired rewards with a delivery failure per Tremendous's own API contract

actions.name: resend_reward

updated_email.description: New recipient email; only applies to email-delivered rewards.

updated_phone.description: New recipient phone; only applies to SMS-delivered rewards.

actions.risk: resends a reward to its recipient (optionally at a new email/phone); only valid for rewards with a previous delivery failure

actions.name: generate_reward_link
actions.risk: generates a new redemption link for an existing LINK-delivery reward; low-risk, does not move funds

actions.name: create_invoice
actions.risk: creates an invoice that funds the organization's Tremendous balance once paid; low direct risk (a document, not a payment itself), no approval required

actions.name: delete_invoice
actions.risk: removes an invoice; per Tremendous's own docs this is a cosmetic operation with no further financial consequence (an already-paid invoice's funds are unaffected)

actions.name: create_member

role.description: Role ID within the organization, e.g. "ADMIN".

actions.risk: invites a new user to manage the Tremendous organization (funding sources, campaigns, orders); grants organization access, approval required

actions.name: create_webhook
actions.risk: registers/replaces the organization's single webhook endpoint; a changed url redirects all future event deliveries to a different endpoint (Tremendous allows exactly one webhook per organization)

actions.name: delete_webhook
actions.risk: permanently removes the organization's webhook subscription; event delivery stops immediately
